license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bf8fjrtn
title: Quick-Hot-Gram-Cromotropo QHGC lugol solution (Agudelo-Lopez SP and Montoya-Palacio MN, 2004)
author: Javier Antonio Benavides

steps_raw.instruction: Homogenize the sample well with a wooden toothpick in the container that contains it
Make a grade spread of approximately 2 cm long by 2 cm wide, sliding the stick impregnated with fecal matter onto a new degreased, dry, or used but clean and scratch-free slide.

Remove excess stool with a clean, chopped wooden toothpick and repeat this procedure with another clean chopped toothpick, until the spread is as thin as possible and with the least amount of lumps of stool
Let to dry at room temperature
Fix the plate in absolute methanol for 5 min
Let it dry at room temperature to proceed with staining or store it in a box wrapped in absorbent paper until staining.
Cover the spread with Crystal violet for 1 min
Wash under running water to remove excess dye
Cover with an acid alcohol solution for 3 min until discolored
Visualize under a microscope with immersion oil at 100X
Permanent fixation use xylene for 1 min
Let to dry and cover with a cover slide and Entellan®
